title: More Than a Married Couple, But Not Lovers
description:
Jirou Yakuin is an ordinary high school student who secretly has feelings for his childhood friend, Shiori Sakurazaka. However, his life becomes complicated after he is paired with the popular and fashionable Akari Watanabe for the school’s unique marriage practical program, where students must live together and act like married couples in order to earn points. Despite constantly arguing and having completely opposite personalities, Jirou and Akari slowly begin understanding each other as they spend more time together.

While both initially hope to switch partners and end up with the people they truly like, their growing bond starts creating confusing emotions neither of them expected. Between awkward romantic moments, jealousy, misunderstandings, and emotional development, Jirou and Akari begin questioning what love really means. Combining romance, comedy, and heartfelt drama, More Than a Married Couple, But Not Lovers tells a sweet story about relationships, personal growth, and feelings that slowly change over time.
